channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Why Nepal's GenZ Is Again On Streets Against PM They Elected Just Months Ago

media:content.media:description: Balendra Shah was elected mayor in 2022.

item.description: On Sunday, hundreds of people took to the streets outside the Singhdurbar Secretariat, a government office in the capital. Many of them carried placards with slogans like 'End atrocity against the poor' and 'Respect human rights.'
item.content:encoded: On Sunday, hundreds of people took to the streets outside the Singhdurbar Secretariat, a government office in the capital. Many of them carried placards with slogans like 'End atrocity against the poor' and 'Respect human rights.'

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US, Iran Both Claim Control Of Strait Of Hormuz As Tensions Escalate
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Quiet Turkey 'U-Turn' Has Loud Consequences For India
item.description: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier
item.content:encoded: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier

item.title: Blocked Door, People On Fire: Witnesses Recount Bangkok Club Blaze Horror

media:content.media:description: It was the deadliest fire in Thailand in over two decades.

item.description: Footage posted on social media showed panicked customers -- some with their clothes and hair on fire -- screaming as they fled through the flame-enveloped front door of the bar.
item.content:encoded: Footage posted on social media showed panicked customers -- some with their clothes and hair on fire -- screaming as they fled through the flame-enveloped front door of the bar.

item.title: US Man In Jail For Wife's Murder In 2002, New Evidence Suggests He Isn't Guilty

media:content.media:description: Scott Peterson was found guilty of murdering his pregnant wife Laci Peterson

item.description: New documentary reveals unseen evidence that may challenge Scott Peterson's 2004 murder conviction.
item.content:encoded: New documentary reveals unseen evidence that may challenge Scott Peterson's 2004 murder conviction.

item.title: Europe Records Over 10,000 Excess Deaths Amid June Heatwave: Report

media:content.media:description: Extreme heatwave in June end disrupted power supplies, shut schools, and smashed temperature records

item.description: Scientists have said the late-June heatwave would have been "virtually impossible" without human-caused climate change, which is making heatwaves more frequent and intense.
item.content:encoded: Scientists have said the late-June heatwave would have been "virtually impossible" without human-caused climate change, which is making heatwaves more frequent and intense.

item.title: From Trump Critic To Trusted Ally: The Political Journey Of Lindsey Graham

media:content.media:description: Graham was due to appear on NBC's "Meet the Press" on Sunday

item.description: Graham, aged 71, died Saturday night after what a preliminary report from the Washington, DC, medical examiner said was a tear in his aorta.
item.content:encoded: Graham, aged 71, died Saturday night after what a preliminary report from the Washington, DC, medical examiner said was a tear in his aorta.

item.title: 2,700 Killed By Heatwaves Across England Between May And June: Study

media:content.media:description: UK Health Security Agency will publish its official estimate of heat-related deaths in coming weeks

item.description: The UK and most of Europe experienced two unprecedented heatwaves in May and June, with monthly records set at 35.1 degrees Celsius and 37.7 degrees Celsius, respectively, in England.
item.content:encoded: The UK and most of Europe experienced two unprecedented heatwaves in May and June, with monthly records set at 35.1 degrees Celsius and 37.7 degrees Celsius, respectively, in England.

item.title: Who Will Replace Lindsey Graham? Battle Begins For Senate Seat

media:content.media:description: Graham leaves a major void in the Senate, where seniority can determine influence (Representational)

item.description: After the death of Lindsey Graham, Governor McMaster must choose a temporary replacement who can serve until the voters choose a new Republican nominee for the general election in January.
item.content:encoded: After the death of Lindsey Graham, Governor McMaster must choose a temporary replacement who can serve until the voters choose a new Republican nominee for the general election in January.

item.title: Trump, Meloni, Macron And More: List Of World Leaders On Iran's Kill List

media:content.media:description: The supreme leader, in his message, said Iran had compiled a list of individuals to be targeted

item.description: The Hamshahri newspaper, which is published by authorities in the Iranian capital, released an infographic online late Saturday featuring photos of 13 foreign leaders alongside Mojtaba's statement.
item.content:encoded: The Hamshahri newspaper, which is published by authorities in the Iranian capital, released an infographic online late Saturday featuring photos of 13 foreign leaders alongside Mojtaba's statement.

item.title: Iran Claims US Military's Drone Fleet In Bahrain Destroyed In Fresh Strikes

media:content.media:description: The US military earlier said it hit some 140 targets in Iran

item.description: The US military began launching more strikes against Iran on Sunday, with US Central Command (Centcom) saying it hit "dozens of targets at multiple locations with precision munitions to degrade Iran's ability to continue attacking international shipping flowing through the Strait of Hormuz".
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126701/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The US military began launching more strikes against Iran on Sunday, with US Central Command (Centcom) saying it hit "dozens of targets at multiple locations with precision munitions to degrade Iran's ability to continue attacking international shipping flowing through the Strait of Hormuz".

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei Ready To Face Public? His Father's Memorial May Hold Answers

media:content.media:description: Ali Khamenei ruled Iran for nearly 37 years before being killed in the US and Israeli airstrikes

item.description: The 56-year-old cleric has been noticeably absent during the funeral prayers for his father last week, which were led by three of his brothers.
item.content:encoded: The 56-year-old cleric has been noticeably absent during the funeral prayers for his father last week, which were led by three of his brothers.

item.title: Mapping The Odyssey: The Geography Behind Homer's Epic Journey

media:content.media:description: The locations from Odysseus's journey might map on to real-world locations.

item.description: The ancient Greek historian Polybius, who came 600 years after Homer, believed The Odyssey was a real story with some myths, rather than the reverse.
item.content:encoded: The ancient Greek historian Polybius, who came 600 years after Homer, believed The Odyssey was a real story with some myths, rather than the reverse.

item.title: 10 Killed After Cargo Truck Crashes Into Vehicles In Mexico

media:content.media:description: Two minors were among the 10 killed, according to Jalisco's Civil Protection agency

item.description: A cargo truck crashed into vehicles responding to an earlier accident in Jalisco, Mexico, killing at least 10 people, including two children.
item.content:encoded: A cargo truck crashed into vehicles responding to an earlier accident in Jalisco, Mexico, killing at least 10 people, including two children.

item.title: Trump Ally Lindsey Graham Died After Aortic Rupture: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump's friend Sen. Lindsey Graham dies at age 71 in South Carolina

item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday night after a rupture in his aorta linked to hardened arteries, his office confirmed, just two days after turning 71
item.content:encoded: Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday night after a rupture in his aorta linked to hardened arteries, his office confirmed, just two days after turning 71

item.title: "He Was Tired": Trump Mourns Death Of Ally Who Called For 500% India Tariff

media:content.media:description: Trump described Graham as a "true American patriot" who would be "greatly missed."

item.description: Graham used his position to push for steep tariffs on nations that imported Russian energy, including India, China, and Brazil. He introduced a bill proposing at least a 500 per cent tariff on nations purchasing Russian energy products.
item.content:encoded: Graham used his position to push for steep tariffs on nations that imported Russian energy, including India, China, and Brazil. He introduced a bill proposing at least a 500 per cent tariff on nations purchasing Russian energy products.

item.title: Ukrainian Drone Strike Sparks Fire At Industrial Zone In Russia

media:content.media:description: Ukraine has been striking Russia, particularly energy targets

item.description: A Ukrainian drone strike ignited a fire in Russia's Stavropol industrial zone as Kyiv intensifies retaliatory attacks amid the ongoing war
item.content:encoded: A Ukrainian drone strike ignited a fire in Russia's Stavropol industrial zone as Kyiv intensifies retaliatory attacks amid the ongoing war

item.title: 91-Year-Old Man Skydives, Raises Over Rs 4 Lakh For Charity

media:content.media:description: He said his next challenge will be to ride a 100-mph (160.9 km/h) zip line in Wales.

item.description: Still said he will never forget going out of the aeroplane and falling through the air, but it was all over so quickly.
item.content:encoded: Still said he will never forget going out of the aeroplane and falling through the air, but it was all over so quickly.

item.title: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: Vietnam Orders Probe After Boat Tragedy Kills 15 Indian Tourists

media:content.media:description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident

item.description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port
item.content:encoded: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Highlights: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port

item.title: 27 Killed, 22 Critical In Massive Fire At Bangkok Bar

media:content.media:description: The blaze broke out at the Na Ladprao pub in northern Bangkok around midnight

item.description: People were seen rushing to escape as flames engulfed the entrance of the venue and thick smoke spread rapidly through the building.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126614/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>People were seen rushing to escape as flames engulfed the entrance of the venue and thick smoke spread rapidly through the building.
